force.title: Force
force.description: Force resource updates through a replacement strategy (delete and recreate the resource)

postRenderer.title: Post renderer
postRenderer.description: The path to an executable to be used for post rendering. If it exists in $PATH, the binary will be used, otherwise it will try to look for the executable at the given path

wait.title: Wait
wait.description: If set, will wait until all Pods, PVCs, Services, and minimum number of Pods of a Deployment are in a ready state before marking the release as successful. It will wait for as long as timeout
